_publications._publicationTitle: Traditional and systems biology based drug discovery for the rare tumor syndrome neurofibromatosis type 2
_publications._context: First description of the MS03 NF2-deficient mouse Schwann cell line. MS03 carries a homozygous deletion of Nf2 exon 2 (Nf2ex2-/-) derived from dorsal root ganglia of PostnCre;Nf2flox/flox mice via Cre-lox recombination. Developed as part of the CTF Synodos for NF2 drug discovery program.

basicInfo.description: Merlin-null (Nf2ex2-/-) mouse Schwann cell line derived from dorsal root ganglia of PostnCre;Nf2flox/flox mice via Cre-lox recombination. Developed by the CTF Synodos for NF2 Consortium.
